title: WWI & WWII rifles
description: A resource pack that adds rifles from WWI and WWII period, works by renaming the crossbow
body:
3D resourse pack which changing texture of crossbow, swords and spears.

Versions prior to 1.21.5 require optifine or CIT resevn.

**Сurrently done:**
- **Kar 98k**
- **Mosin Nagant**
- **Arisaka t38**
- **M1 Garand**
- **Mannlicher M1886**
- **Lee-Enfield Mk I**
- **Lebel M1886**
- **Carcano Mod 91**
- **Krag-Jorgensen**
- **MAS-36**
- **Arisaka t99**
- **Springfield 1903**
- **Gewehr 43**
- **SVT-40**
- **AVS-36**
- **M1 Carbine**
- **RSC 1917**
- **Mosin Nagant M27**
- **Swiss K31**
- **Gewehr 98**
- **Lee-Enfield Mk III**
- **Carcano Mod 38**

**In the future:**
- Ross rifle
- Mannlicher M1895
- Gewehr 88 

**You can suggest others in my discord.**

Rename crossbow on anvil to "Kar 98k", "Mosin Nagant", "Arisaka t38", "M1 Garand", "Mannlicher M1886", "Lee-Enfield Mk I", "Lebel M1886", "Carcano Mod 91", "Krag-Jorgensen", "MAS-36", "Arisaka t99", "Springfield 1903", "Gewehr 43", "SVT-40", "AVS-36", "M1 Carbine", "RSC 1917",
"Mosin Nagant M27", "Swiss K31", "Gewehr 98", "Lee-Enfield Mk III" or "Carcano Mod 38";

for the version with bayonet: "(rifle name) with bayonet"; (you can also rename spears) 

for the version with a sight: "(rifle name) sniper";

for the version with a Schiessbecher (for Kar 98k): "Kar 98k Schiessbecher" or "Kar 98k Schiessbecher act." (act. version has a different animation and is designed for fireworks as a projectile)

bayonets: "Russian four-sidet bayonet", "S8498", "t30", "M1", "Mannlicher M88 bayonet", "Pattern1907", "Rosalie", "M91 bayonet", "US M1892 bayonet", "MAS36 bayonet", "SVT bayonet", "AVS bayonet", "M4", "M35", "Swiss M1918 bayonet", "Seitengewehr 98", "Carcano folding bayonet"

and enjoy playing with the rifles from this pack.
